/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/frame_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/mqtt_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/mqtt_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/uart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app_exe.dir/src/uart_manager.cpp.o -o app_exe  -Wl,-rpath,/home/cyf/app_demo/project_demo/lib/lib /home/cyf/app_demo/project_demo/lib/lib/libjsoncpp.so /home/cyf/app_demo/project_demo/lib/lib/libpaho-mqtt3a.so /home/cyf/app_demo/project_demo/lib/lib/libpaho-mqttpp3.so
